text: Please give me a hero video for the background of a website where it's going to start with a TV on a fashionable wall. The camera zooms into the TV, which has a multi-monitor desktop in it. Perfect! I've created your hero video with the seamless zoom-through transition showcasing your complete tech ecosystem.
